name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Autonomous GTM operating system — multichannel orchestration, AARRR funnel diagnostics, Tribe v2 neural pre-testing, Synthetic Demand Validation (SDV) — science-backed demand/price/objection pre-testing (free-text→Likert, comparative-first, fidelity-tiered) with a unified neuro+SDV pre-flight gate and Van Westendorp/Gabor-Granger pricing, the High-Velocity Advertising (HVA) engine for creative discovery at machine speed (CLEAR decision rule + deterministic scorer + the Vault moat), browser QA (Playwright + Computer Use), cross-channel attribution, codebase-aware asset generation, native Meta Ads CLI integration, and Routines for always-on optimization. 16 agents, 30 commands, 17 skills.
